channel.title: ABLITERATED.cloud model field notes
channel.description: Source-linked field notes on the exact abliterated open model artifacts in the ABLITERATED.cloud catalog.

item.title: Inside Huihui-Qwen3.6: 256 experts and one refusal direction
item.description: A sparse multimodal giant and huihui-ai's refusal-direction weight edit.

item.title: Ornith 35B: can self-scaffolding survive abliteration?
item.description: DeepReinforce's coding scaffold, YuYu1015's corrected weights and the boundary between upstream and derivative benchmarks.

item.title: Qwythos 9B: a model with three lives
item.description: Qwen architecture, Empero post-training and huihui-ai's final refusal-reduction pass.

item.title: Ornith 397B: surgery on a model too large to hold at once
item.description: A shard-by-shard abliteration and W4A16 conversion of a 396.8-billion-parameter sparse model.
